author: vadim borisov (tabularis.ai)
name: 11L + Efficient Partial XSA + FA3 + SWA/120 (val_bpb: 1.1307)
blurb: 11 layers, int6 quant, zstd-22. Novel contribution: Efficient Partial Exclusive Self Attention (XSA, arXiv:2603.09078) applied to deepest 3 layers only. GQA-aware reshape avoids tensor duplication, adding <2ms/step overhead. XSA subtracts self-value projection from attention output, forcing deeper layers to learn from context rather than self-reference. SWA every 120 steps (13 checkpoint avg). OrthoInit + muP scaling. SmearGate + BigramHash(2048x128). FlashAttention 3 + NTK RoPE. Weight decay 0.04 (Muon+AdamW).
